'''Veccacopia''' was an astronomical object<ref name="NEGTC" /> located within the [[Veccacopia system/Legends|Veccacopia system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Tunka sector/Legends|Tunka sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Cacop]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="NEGTC" />

Veccacopia was discovered by the wider [[galactic community]]<ref name="NEGTC" /> at some point before [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' states that Veccacopia had been discovered at some point prior to [[Finis Valorum]] becoming a [[Senator/Legends|Senator]]. Since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes Valorum was a Senator by [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], it can be deduced that the celestial body had been discovered by that date.</ref> and was designated a [[Republic protectorate|protectorate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Over [[Time/Legends|time]], Veccacopia's judicial office grew corrupt, with [[Judge/Legends|judges]] not doing their best at their jobs and convicted Cacops hiring Cacop stand-ins to serve their sentences instead.<ref name="NEGTC" />

Not long after Veccacopia's discovery, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] served as a judge there under frontier conditions, working hard to make a difference in his post. When Valorum learned of the Cacops' deception and the inability of his [[Bailiff/Legends|bailiffs]] to distinguish between the guilty [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] and the doubles, he broke the corruption ring of the local judicial office by instituting a mandatory [[Retinal scan/Legends|retinal scan]].<ref name="NEGTC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Veccacopia was first mentioned in the [[2002]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'', which was authored by [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="NEGTC" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Veccacopia [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Veccacopia, in grid square I-19.<ref name="EAOC" />
